base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of level_preview_pause — a ui (menu_screen) from 1988 super mario bros 2. Level-entry preview screen (shows world/level banner pre-stage) + pause-menu overlay. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Level-entry preview screen (shows world/level banner pre-stage) + pause-menu overlay
